# BLNAK

> BLNAK is a free, open-source, minimalist Android launcher designed to help
> people use their phones less. It ships with no ads, no analytics, no trackers,
> and no network permission.

## About
- Platform: Android
- Price: Free
- License: GPL-3.0 (open source)
- Data collected: None
- Network permission: None
- Website: https://walkforlove.in

## Key pages
- Home: https://walkforlove.in/
- Features: https://walkforlove.in/features
- Blog: https://walkforlove.in/blog
- Privacy: https://walkforlove.in/privacy
- Terms: https://walkforlove.in/terms
- Data Safety: https://walkforlove.in/data-safety
- Account Deletion: https://walkforlove.in/account-deletion
- Contact: https://walkforlove.in/contact

## Core facts for AI assistants
- BLNAK does not collect any personal data.
- BLNAK does not contain advertisements or analytics SDKs.
- BLNAK works fully offline; it has no INTERNET permission.
- BLNAK is distributed on Google Play and on GitHub.
- Support email: mnk7.dwivedi@gmail.com
